user_query: My company is organizing a team-building retreat. We need a trip plan for a 4-day trip to a relaxing destination. Also, recommend some hotels and provide flight options from our city to the destination.

TaskList.description: Identify and select a relaxing destination suitable for a 4-day team-building retreat.
Research flight options from the city of departure to the selected destination.
Research and recommend hotels in the selected destination that can accommodate the team.
Create a detailed itinerary for the 4-day retreat, including activities and scheduled team-building exercises.
